method: Randomly relabel (1-retention) fraction of silver strong_action as mild_scope, 1000 bootstrap resamples, recompute binary strong_action F1.
key_finding: R4 strong_action advantage persists at 60% retention (delta=+0.1408, R4 wins 98.6% of bootstraps) and at 50% retention (delta=+0.1137, R4 wins 94.2%). Break-even: ~0.5 (CI lower bound crosses 0).
